_patch_meta.description: Session B completion patch for registry 98 (justice). Sets session_b_status to Session B Complete. Also corrects the registry status anomaly from PATCH-20260326-98-PREANALYSIS-V1 where word_registry.session_b_status was left as Pre-Analysis Complete rather than updated to Analysis Complete. Session B analysis document produced: justice_98_session_b_analysis_20260326.docx. 62 working terms analysed across 6 parts. 14 research flags raised (PH2-98-001 through PH2-98-014).

operations.description: PREANALYSIS patch OP-105 did not apply the update_registry operation correctly — word_registry.session_b_status was left as Pre-Analysis Complete rather than Analysis Complete. OP-001 in this patch corrects to Session B Complete directly. Claude Code should investigate why the update_registry op in PATCH-20260326-98-PREANALYSIS-V1 was not applied, and why patch_history shows patch_id=null and applied_at=null. Check engine_run_log for the PREANALYSIS patch entry.

Session B analysis complete for registry 98 (justice). Document: justice_98_session_b_analysis_20260326.docx. Working set: 62 terms (32 extracted, 29 extracted_thin, 1 extracted_theological_anchor, 2 xref_prayer, 2 candidate_delete). 24 deleted as bleed. Research flags PH2-98-001 through PH2-98-014 raised. Key cross-registry flag: PH2-98-014 prayer xref Session D review. Theological anchor: H6664H YHWH Tsidqenu (Jer 23:6; 33:16).
